patch_name: Memory Budget Receipt Serialization Macro Recursion Hotfix Seal
build_error: recursion limit reached while expanding $crate::json_internal! at crates/orchestrator_local/src/memory_budget_guard.rs:236
root_cause: decision_receipt_json used a large serde_json::json! object literal, causing macro expansion recursion depth overflow in orchestrator_local.
fix: Replaced the large json! receipt literal with a typed MemoryBudgetReceipt struct serialized via serde_json::to_value; removed serde_json::json import.
reason_no_recursion_limit_attribute: Avoids masking macro recursion expansion rather than increasing crate-wide macro recursion budget.
